final:
module sata_controller (
    input [3:0] command,
    output reg [3:0] command_out
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (command == 4'b1010) // 0xA in binary
            command_out = ~command; // Invert the command
        else
            command_out = command; // Pass the command unchanged
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (command != 4'b1010) begin
        command_out <= command;
      end else begin
        command_out <= ~command;
      end;
    end
  end

endmodule
